name: RENHENG Enterprise Holdings Limited
summary: RENHENG Enterprise Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells tobacco machinery products in the People's Republic of China. It offers special-purpose tobacco machinery products, such as casing and flavoring systems, pneumatic feeding systems, and pre-pressing packing machines. The company also provides non-catalogued ancillary tobacco machinery, including dedusting systems and swelling agent delivery systems; and maintenance, overhaul, and modification services. RENHENG Enterprise Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
